name:

com.blockether.spel.api-showcase-test.Showcase: API-only tests with Playwright tracing — every request and

descriptionHtml: Performs GET requests through (.request (.context pg)) (BrowserContext.request()). The Playwright trace captures the full request URL, headers, query params, response headers, and response body — all without opening a browser page.
